name: Tres Leches
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs and sugar by hand for one minute.
2. Place in a double boiler.
3. Heat until hot (do not boil).
4. Beat until doubled in size, approximately 10 minutes.
5. Slowly add flour and melted butter, mixing slowly.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes in a greased Pyrex dish.
7. In a 2-quart pan, combine 3 cups milk and sugar. Bring to a boil.
8. Beat egg whites and 1/2 cup milk until foamy.
9. Add the beaten mixture to the hot milk mixture, stirring continuously.
10. Remove from heat, add nutmeg, and pour over the cake.
11. Cool completely.
12. Frost with desired frosting (marshmallow, Cool Whip, or real whipped cream).
13. Sprinkle with chopped nuts.
14. Refrigerate. Do not freeze.
15. Serves 16 to 20.
